mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtPopCreateAlObDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 생성한 릴리즈 상세건 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey}
mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > DAS 출고 대상 SQL */ WITH OB_BASE AS ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.CBM , (OH.WEIGHT / 1000) AS WEIGHT , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , GREATEST(COALESCE(ICUTX.WIDTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.DEPTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.HEIGHT, 0)) AS MAXLEN , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY , OD.OBDTKEY , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'DW' AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.OBHDTYPECD IN ('10','20') AND OH.OBHDDAY BETWEEN #{obhddayfr} AND #{obhddayto} ), OB_INFO AS ( SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY CLASSIFSPECCD, OBHDKEY ASC, OBHDKEY ASC) AS ROWNO FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM , WEIGHT , COUNT(ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS PCS , MAX(MAXLEN) AS MAXLEN , ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 0) AS RBRATIO , SUM(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS FBPCS , COUNT(OBDTKEY) AS OBDT_CNT FROM OB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , CLASSIFSPECCD , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM , WEIGHT ) A WHERE 1=1
), OB_SKU AS ( SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) SKU FROM OB_INFO OB INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OB.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD )

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasSkuSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > DAS 출고 대상(SKU 집중화) SQL */ , ITEM_RANK AS ( /* [1단계] 품목코드별 등장 건수 순위 */ SELECT DT.CTKEY , DT.OWKEY , DT.ICKEY , HD.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) AS OBHD_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY HD.CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) DESC) AS ITEM_RK FROM OB_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY GROUP BY DT.CTKEY, DT.OWKEY, DT.ICKEY, HD.CLASSIFSPECCD ), HD_MATCH AS ( /* [2단계] 품목 우선순위별로, 그 품목을 포함한 헤더-규격 조합 매핑 */ SELECT HD.CTKEY , HD.OWKEY , HD.OBHDKEY , HD.CLASSIFSPECCD , IR.ICKEY , IR.ITEM_RK FROM OB_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN ITEM_RANK IR ON DT.CTKEY = IR.CTKEY AND DT.OWKEY = IR.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IR.ICKEY AND HD.CLASSIFSPECCD = IR.CLASSIFSPECCD ), OB_RANK AS ( /* [3단계] 규격별로, 품목 우선순위를 기준으로 헤더 순위를 매김 */ SELECT OBINFO.CTKEY , OBINFO.OWKEY , OBINFO.OBORDKEY , OBINFO.OBHDKEY , OBINFO.CLASSIFSPECCD , OBINFO.CBM , OBINFO.WEIGHT , OBINFO.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OBINFO.MAXLEN , OBINFO.SKU , OBINFO.PCS , OBINFO.OBDT_CNT , OB.RK AS RKNO FROM (SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY , CLASSIFSPECCD , MIN(ITEM_RK) AS BEST_ITEM_RK -- 헤더가 가진 품목 중 가장 높은 우선순위 , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY MIN(ITEM_RK)) AS RK FROM HD_MATCH GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, CLASSIFSPECCD, OBHDKEY) OB INNER JOIN OB_INFO OBINFO ON OB.CTKEY = OBINFO.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OBINFO.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OBINFO.OBHDKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = OBINFO.CLASSIFSPECCD )
mapper.select:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasAnly - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 출고 분석 현황 조회 */
SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(OB.OBHDKEY) AS OB_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(OB.OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS OB_CNT_RATIO , OS.SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(OS.SKU) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS SKU_RATIO , SUM(PCS) AS PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(PCS)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS PCS_RATIO , SUM(CASE OB.CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS S_SET , SUM(CASE OB.CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS M_SET , SUM(CASE OB.CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'L' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS L_SET FROM OB_INFO OB INNER JOIN OB_SKU OS ON OB.CTKEY = OS.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OS.OWKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = OS.CLASSIFSPECCD GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , OS.SKU ORDER BY OB.CLASSIFSPECCD DESC

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSet - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 분류 STN 설정 조회 */ WITH STN_GRP AS ( SELECT MST.CTKEY , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD , MIN(MST.STNBARCODE) AS STNBARCODE , STRING_AGG(DISTINCT MST.STNNO, ',' ORDER BY MST.STNBARCODE) GRP_STNNO , COUNT(DISTINCT MST.CELLALCRITCD) AS CELLALCRITCD_CNT FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY MST.CTKEY , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD ), CELL_DAS AS ( SELECT MST.CTKEY , MST.STNNO , MST.STNBARCODE , '' AS CLASSIFSPECCD , SUM(CASE CST.USEYN WHEN 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS AVCELL , 0 AS CNT , MST.USEYN , 0 AS TOT_AVCELL , 0 AS TOT_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY MST.CTKEY, MST.STNNO) ROW_NUM FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '10' /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY MST.CTKEY , MST.STNNO , MST.STNBARCODE , MST.USEYN ), CELL_PLT AS ( SELECT MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MST.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , '('||STN.GRP_STNNO||' STN)' AS GRP_STNNO /*스테이션 그룹*/ , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , MST.CELLALCRITCD /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , CST.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , CST.CELLBARCODE /*셀바코드*/ , CST.DIRTDIVCD /*방향구분코드*/ , CST.ROWNO /*행번호*/ , CST.COLNO /*열번호*/ , CST.CELLNO /*셀번호*/ , CST.GRPNO /*그룹번호*/ , CST.PRINO /*우선순위번호*/ , CST.RTYN /*롤테이너여부*/ , CST.USEYN /*사용여부*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER (CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.DIRTDIVCD, 'Z') WHEN 'L' THEN 1 WHEN 'R' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) WHEN '20' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.DIRTDIVCD, 'Z') WHEN 'L' THEN 1 WHEN 'R' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) WHEN '30' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.DIRTDIVCD, 'Z') WHEN 'L' THEN 1 WHEN 'R' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) WHEN '40' THEN TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(CST.PRINO, CST.CELLNO)) ELSE CAST(MST.CTKEY AS NUMERIC) END) ASC , TO_NUMBER (CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN (CASE WHEN DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN CST.CELLNO ELSE CST.COLNO END) WHEN '20' THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '3' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '2' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '2' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '1' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '1' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '3' END) WHEN '30' THEN COLNO WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , TO_NUMBER (CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '20' THEN CST.COLNO WHEN '30' THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '3' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '1' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '2' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '2' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '1' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '3' END) WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC ) AS ROW_NUM FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN STN_GRP STN ON CST.CTKEY = STN.CTKEY AND CST.STNBARCODE = STN.STNBARCODE AND STN.CLASSIFDIVCD = '20' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ ), CELL_LIGHT1 AS ( SELECT MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MST.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , '('||STN.GRP_STNNO||' STN)' AS GRP_STNNO /*스테이션 그룹*/ , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , MST.CELLALCRITCD /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , CST.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , CST.CELLBARCODE /*셀바코드*/ , CST.DIRTDIVCD /*방향구분코드*/ , CST.ROWNO /*행번호*/ , CST.COLNO /*열번호*/ , CST.CELLNO /*셀번호*/ , CST.GRPNO /*그룹번호*/ , CST.PRINO /*우선순위번호*/ , CST.RTYN /*롤테이너여부*/ , CST.USEYN /*사용여부*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN CST.CELLNO WHEN '20' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '2' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '3' END) WHEN '30' THEN (CASE WHEN CST.ROWNO = 3 THEN (CAST(CST.COLNO AS NUMERIC) - 1)::TEXT ELSE CST.COLNO END) WHEN '40' THEN COALESCE(CST.PRINO, CST.CELLNO) ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , TO_NUMBER(CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '20' THEN CST.COLNO WHEN '30' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '3' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '2' END) WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC ) AS ROW_NUM FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN STN_GRP STN ON CST.CTKEY = STN.CTKEY AND CST.STNBARCODE = STN.STNBARCODE AND STN.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND STN.CLASSIFTYPECD = '10' /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ WHERE CST.CELLNO NOT IN ('01') ), CELL_LIGHT2 AS ( SELECT MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MST.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , '('||STN.GRP_STNNO||' STN)' AS GRP_STNNO /*스테이션 그룹*/ , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , MST.CELLALCRITCD /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , CST.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , CST.CELLBARCODE /*셀바코드*/ , CST.DIRTDIVCD /*방향구분코드*/ , CST.ROWNO /*행번호*/ , CST.COLNO /*열번호*/ , CST.CELLNO /*셀번호*/ , CST.GRPNO /*그룹번호*/ , CST.PRINO /*우선순위번호*/ , CST.RTYN /*롤테이너여부*/ , CST.USEYN /*사용여부*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN CST.CELLNO WHEN '20' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '2' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '3' END) WHEN '30' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '40' THEN COALESCE(CST.PRINO, CST.CELLNO) ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , CAST(CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '10' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '20' THEN CST.COLNO WHEN '30' THEN (CASE WHEN CST.ROWNO = 3 THEN (TO_NUMBER(CST.COLNO) + 1)::TEXT ELSE CST.COLNO END) WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END AS NUMERIC) DESC , TO_NUMBER(CASE MST.CELLALCRITCD WHEN '30' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '3' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '2' END) END) ASC ) AS ROW_NUM FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN STN_GRP STN ON CST.CTKEY = STN.CTKEY AND CST.STNBARCODE = STN.STNBARCODE AND STN.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ AND STN.CLASSIFTYPECD = '20' /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ WHERE CST.CELLNO NOT IN ('01') ) SELECT 0 AS CHK , DAS.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , DAS.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , DAS.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/ , DAS.CLASSIFSPECCD /*규격*/ , 0 AS AVCELL , DAS.AVCELL /*가용셀*/ , DAS.CNT /*건수*/ , 'N' AS USEYN
, DAS.TOT_AVCELL /*가용셀합계*/ , DAS.TOT_CNT /*건수합계*/ , PLT.STNNO AS STNNO_PLT /*스테이션번호*/ , PLT.GRP_STNNO AS GRP_STNNO_PLT /*스테이션그룹*/ , PLT.STNBARCODE AS STNBARCODE_PLT /*스테이션바코드*/ , NULL AS CELLNO_PLT /*셀번호*/-->
, PLT.CELLALCRITCD AS CELLALCRITCD_PLT /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , LIGHT1.STNNO AS STNNO_LIGHT1 /*스테이션번호*/ , LIGHT1.GRP_STNNO AS GRP_STNNO_LIGHT1 /*스테이션그룹*/ , LIGHT1.STNBARCODE AS STNBARCODE_LIGHT1 /*스테이션바코드*/ , NULL AS CELLNO_LIGHT1 /*셀번호*/-->
, LIGHT1.CELLALCRITCD AS CELLALCRITCD_LIGHT1 /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , LIGHT2.STNNO AS STNNO_LIGHT2 /*스테이션번호*/ , LIGHT2.GRP_STNNO AS GRP_STNNO_LIGHT2 /*스테이션그룹*/ , LIGHT2.STNBARCODE AS STNBARCODE_LIGHT2 /*스테이션바코드*/ , NULL AS CELLNO_LIGHT2 /*셀번호*/
, LIGHT2.CELLALCRITCD AS CELLALCRITCD_LIGHT2 /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , 0 AS S_CNT , 0 AS M_CNT , 0 AS L_CNT FROM CELL_DAS DAS LEFT OUTER JOIN CELL_PLT PLT ON DAS.CTKEY = PLT.CTKEY AND DAS.ROW_NUM = PLT.ROW_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN CELL_LIGHT1 LIGHT1 ON DAS.CTKEY = LIGHT1.CTKEY AND DAS.ROW_NUM = LIGHT1.ROW_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN CELL_LIGHT2 LIGHT2 ON DAS.CTKEY = LIGHT2.CTKEY AND DAS.ROW_NUM = LIGHT2.ROW_NUM

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetDas - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 분류 STN (DAS) 조회 */ SELECT A.* , ' ' AS LCBO01, ' ' AS LCBO02, ' ' AS LCBO03, ' ' AS LCBO04, ' ' AS LCBO05 , ' ' AS LCBO06, ' ' AS LCBO07, ' ' AS LCBO08, ' ' AS LCBO09, ' ' AS LCBO10 , ' ' AS LCBO11, ' ' AS LCBO12, ' ' AS LCBO13, ' ' AS LCBO14, ' ' AS LCBO15 , ' ' AS LCBO16, ' ' AS LCBO17, ' ' AS LCBO18, ' ' AS LCBO19, ' ' AS LCBO20 , ' ' AS LCBO21, ' ' AS LCBO22, ' ' AS LCBO23, ' ' AS LCBO24, ' ' AS LCBO25 , ' ' AS LCBO26, ' ' AS LCBO27, ' ' AS LCBO28, ' ' AS LCBO29, ' ' AS LCBO30 , ' ' AS LCBO31, ' ' AS LCBO32, ' ' AS LCBO33, ' ' AS LCBO01, ' ' AS LCBO34 , ' ' AS LCBO35, ' ' AS LCBO36, ' ' AS LCBO37, ' ' AS LCBO38, ' ' AS LCBO39 , ' ' AS LCBO40 , ' ' AS RCBO01, ' ' AS RCBO02, ' ' AS RCBO03, ' ' AS RCBO04, ' ' AS RCBO05 , ' ' AS RCBO06, ' ' AS RCBO07, ' ' AS RCBO08, ' ' AS RCBO09, ' ' AS RCBO10 , ' ' AS RCBO11, ' ' AS RCBO12, ' ' AS RCBO13, ' ' AS RCBO14, ' ' AS RCBO15 , ' ' AS RCBO16, ' ' AS RCBO17, ' ' AS RCBO18, ' ' AS RCBO19, ' ' AS RCBO20 , ' ' AS RCBO21, ' ' AS RCBO22, ' ' AS RCBO23, ' ' AS RCBO24, ' ' AS RCBO25 , ' ' AS RCBO26, ' ' AS RCBO27, ' ' AS RCBO28, ' ' AS RCBO29, ' ' AS RCBO30 , ' ' AS RCBO31, ' ' AS RCBO32, ' ' AS RCBO33, ' ' AS RCBO01, ' ' AS RCBO34 , ' ' AS RCBO35, ' ' AS RCBO36, ' ' AS RCBO37, ' ' AS RCBO38, ' ' AS RCBO39 , ' ' AS RCBO40 FROM ( SELECT CTKEY, STNNO, STNBARCODE , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L01' THEN USEYN END) AS L01, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L02' THEN USEYN END) AS L02, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L03' THEN USEYN END) AS L03, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L04' THEN USEYN END) AS L04, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L05' THEN USEYN END) AS L05, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L06' THEN USEYN END) AS L06, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L07' THEN USEYN END) AS L07, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L08' THEN USEYN END) AS L08, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L09' THEN USEYN END) AS L09, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L10' THEN USEYN END) AS L10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L11' THEN USEYN END) AS L11, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L12' THEN USEYN END) AS L12, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L13' THEN USEYN END) AS L13, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L14' THEN USEYN END) AS L14, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L15' THEN USEYN END) AS L15, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L16' THEN USEYN END) AS L16, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L17' THEN USEYN END) AS L17, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L18' THEN USEYN END) AS L18, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L19' THEN USEYN END) AS L19, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L20' THEN USEYN END) AS L20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L21' THEN USEYN END) AS L21, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L22' THEN USEYN END) AS L22, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L23' THEN USEYN END) AS L23, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L24' THEN USEYN END) AS L24, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L25' THEN USEYN END) AS L25, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L26' THEN USEYN END) AS L26, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L27' THEN USEYN END) AS L27, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L28' THEN USEYN END) AS L28, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L29' THEN USEYN END) AS L29, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L30' THEN USEYN END) AS L30 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L31' THEN USEYN END) AS L31, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L32' THEN USEYN END) AS L32, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L33' THEN USEYN END) AS L33, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L34' THEN USEYN END) AS L34, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L35' THEN USEYN END) AS L35, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L36' THEN USEYN END) AS L36, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L37' THEN USEYN END) AS L37, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L38' THEN USEYN END) AS L38, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L39' THEN USEYN END) AS L39, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'L40' THEN USEYN END) AS L40 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R01' THEN USEYN END) AS R01, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R02' THEN USEYN END) AS R02, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R03' THEN USEYN END) AS R03, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R04' THEN USEYN END) AS R04, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R05' THEN USEYN END) AS R05, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R06' THEN USEYN END) AS R06, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R07' THEN USEYN END) AS R07, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R08' THEN USEYN END) AS R08, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R09' THEN USEYN END) AS R09, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R10' THEN USEYN END) AS R10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R11' THEN USEYN END) AS R11, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R12' THEN USEYN END) AS R12, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R13' THEN USEYN END) AS R13, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = CELL = 'R18' THEN USEYN END) AS R18, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R19' THEN USEYN END) AS R19, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R20' THEN USEYN END) AS R20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R21' THEN USEYN END) AS R21, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R22' THEN USEYN END) AS R22, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R23' THEN USEYN END) AS R23, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R24' THEN USEYN END) AS R24, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R25' THEN USEYN END) AS R25, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R26' THEN USEYN END) AS R26, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R27' THEN USEYN END) AS R27, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R28' THEN USEYN END) AS R28, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R29' THEN USEYN END) AS R29, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R30' THEN USEYN END) AS R30 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R31' THEN USEYN END) AS R31, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R32' THEN USEYN END) AS R32, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R33' THEN USEYN END) AS R33, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R34' THEN USEYN END) AS R34, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R35' THEN USEYN END) AS R35, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R36' THEN USEYN END) AS R36, MAX(CASE WHEN CELL = 'R37' THEN MST.STNNO , MST.STNBARCODE /*, CST.CELLBARCODE*/ , DIRTDIVCD || CELLNO AS CELL , (CASE CST.USEYN WHEN 'N' THEN 'T' ELSE CST.USEYN END) AS USEYN FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.STNDIVCD = '10' AND MST.USEYN = 'Y' ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY, STNNO, STNBARCODE ORDER BY CTKEY, STNBARCODE ) A

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetPlt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 분류 STN (PLT) 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY, STNNO, STNDIVCD, CLASSIFDIVCD, CLASSIFTYPECD, CELLALCRITCD, STNBARCODE , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL02' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL02, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL03' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL03, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL04' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL04, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL05' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL05, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL06' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL06, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL07' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL07, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL08' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL08, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL09' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL09, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL10' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL12' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL12, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL13' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL13, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL14' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL14, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL15' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL15, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL16' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL16, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL17' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL17, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL18' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL18, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL19' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL19, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL20' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL22' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL22, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL23' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL23, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL24' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL24, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL25' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL25, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL26' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL26, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL27' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL27, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL28' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL28, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL29' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL29, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL30' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL30 FROM ( SELECT MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MST.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , MST.CELLALCRITCD /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , CST.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/
, 'CELL' || CST.CELLNO AS CELLNO /*셀번호*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER (CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN COALESCE(CST.DIRTDIVCD, 'Z') WHEN '20' THEN COALESCE(CST.DIRTDIVCD, 'Z') WHEN '30' THEN COALESCE(CST.DIRTDIVCD, 'Z') WHEN '40' THEN COALESCE(CST.PRINO, CST.CELLNO) ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , (CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN (CASE WHEN DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN CST.CELLNO ELSE CST.COLNO END) WHEN '20' THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '3' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '2' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '2' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '1' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '1' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '3' END) WHEN '30' THEN COLNO WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , TO_NUMBER (CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '20' THEN CST.COLNO WHEN '30' THEN (CASE WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '3' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '1' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '2' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '2' WHEN COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) = '1' AND DIRTDIVCD IS NULL THEN '3' END) WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC ) AS PRINO FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND CST.STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY, STNNO, STNDIVCD, CLASSIFDIVCD, CLASSIFTYPECD, CELLALCRITCD, STNBARCODE

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetLight1 - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 분류 STN (경량1)) 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY, STNNO, STNDIVCD, CLASSIFDIVCD, CLASSIFTYPECD, CELLALCRITCD, STNBARCODE , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL02' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL02, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL03' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL03, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL04' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL04, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL05' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL05, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL06' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL06, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL07' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL07, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL08' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL08, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL09' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL09, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL10' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL11' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL11, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL12' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL12, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL13' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL13, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL14' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL14, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL15' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL15, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL16' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL16, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL17' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL17, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL18' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL18, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL19' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL19, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL20' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL21' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL21, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL22' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL22, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL23' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL23, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL24' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL24, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL25' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL25, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL26' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL26, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL27' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL27, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL28' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL28, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL29' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL29, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL30' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL30 FROM ( SELECT MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MST.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , MST.CELLALCRITCD /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , CST.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/
, 'CELL' || CST.CELLNO AS CELLNO /*셀번호*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN CST.CELLNO WHEN '20' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '2' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '3' END) WHEN '30' THEN (CASE WHEN CST.ROWNO = 3 THEN (CAST(CST.COLNO AS NUMERIC) - 1)::TEXT ELSE CST.COLNO END) WHEN '40' THEN COALESCE(CST.PRINO, CST.CELLNO) ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , TO_NUMBER(CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '20' THEN CST.COLNO WHEN '30' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '3' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '2' END) WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC ) AS PRINO FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND CST.STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} AND CST.CELLNO NOT IN ('01') ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY, STNNO, STNDIVCD, CLASSIFDIVCD, CLASSIFTYPECD, CELLALCRITCD, STNBARCODE

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetLight2 - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 분류 STN (경량2) 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY, STNNO, STNDIVCD, CLASSIFDIVCD, CLASSIFTYPECD, CELLALCRITCD, STNBARCODE , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL02' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL02, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL03' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL03, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL04' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL04, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL05' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL05, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL06' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL06, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL07' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL07, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL08' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL08, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL09' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL09, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL10' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL11' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL11, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL12' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL12, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL13' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL13, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL14' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL14, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL15' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL15, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL16' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL16, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL17' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL17, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL18' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL18, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL19' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL19, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL20' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL21' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL21, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL22' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL22, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL23' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL23, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL24' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL24, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL25' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL25, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL26' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL26, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL27' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL27, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL28' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL28, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL29' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL29, MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL30' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL30 FROM ( SELECT MST.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , MST.STNNO /*스테이션번호*/ , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , MST.CELLALCRITCD /*셀할당기준코드 - 10:표준 할당, 20:단 기준할당, 30:열 기준할당, 40:프리 할당*/ , CST.STNBARCODE /*스테이션바코드*/
, 'CELL' || CST.CELLNO AS CELLNO /*셀번호*/ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN CST.CELLNO WHEN '20' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '2' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '3' END) WHEN '30' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '40' THEN COALESCE(CST.PRINO, CST.CELLNO) ELSE MST.CTKEY END) ASC , CAST(CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '10' THEN MST.CTKEY WHEN '20' THEN CST.COLNO WHEN '30' THEN (CASE WHEN CST.ROWNO = 3 THEN (TO_NUMBER(CST.COLNO) + 1)::TEXT ELSE CST.COLNO END) WHEN '40' THEN MST.CTKEY ELSE MST.CTKEY END AS NUMERIC) DESC , TO_NUMBER(CASE #{cellalcritcd} WHEN '30' THEN (CASE COALESCE(CST.ROWNO, 0) WHEN '3' THEN '3' WHEN '2' THEN '1' WHEN '1' THEN '2' END) END) ASC ) AS PRINO FROM TWORK_MST_STN MST INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON MST.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND MST.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CST.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND CST.STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} AND CST.CELLNO NOT IN ('01') ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY, STNNO, STNDIVCD, CLASSIFDIVCD, CLASSIFTYPECD, CELLALCRITCD, STNBARCODE

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetAssign - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 주문 배정 현황(오더번호순) 조회 */
SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(OB.OBHDKEY) AS OB_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(OB.OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS OB_CNT_RATIO , OS.SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(OS.SKU) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS SKU_RATIO , SUM(PCS) AS PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(PCS)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS PCS_RATIO FROM OB_INFO OB INNER JOIN OB_SKU OS ON OB.CTKEY = OS.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OS.OWKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = OS.CLASSIFSPECCD WHERE ((OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = 'S' AND ROWNO <= #{sCnt}) OR (OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = 'M' AND ROWNO <= #{mCnt}) OR (OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = 'L' AND ROWNO <= #{lCnt})) GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , OS.SKU ORDER BY CLASSIFSPECCD DESC

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetAssignSku - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 주문 배정 현황(SKU 집중화) 조회 */
SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(OB.OBHDKEY) AS OB_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(DISTINCT OB.OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS OB_CNT_RATIO , OS.SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(OS.SKU) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS SKU_RATIO , SUM(OB.PCS) AS PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(OB.PCS)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS PCS_RATIO FROM OB_RANK OB INNER JOIN OB_SKU OS ON OB.CTKEY = OS.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OS.OWKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = OS.CLASSIFSPECCD WHERE ((OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = 'S' AND RKNO <= #{sCnt}) OR (OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = 'M' AND RKNO <= #{mCnt}) OR (OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = 'L' AND RKNO <= #{lCnt})) GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.CLASSIFSPECCD , OS.SKU ORDER BY CLASSIFSPECCD DESC

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetAssignRslt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 작업계획 결과 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , (SUM(CASE CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'L' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || '/' || SUM(CASE CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || '/' || SUM(CASE CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS DAS_SPEC_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS DAS_OB_CNT , #{dasStnUseGrp} AS DAS_STN_USE_GRP , (CASE #{dasSkuChk} WHEN 'Y' THEN '20' ELSE '10' END) AS DAS_SKU_CHK FROM OB_INFO WHERE ((CLASSIFSPECCD = 'S' AND ROWNO <= #{sCnt}) OR (CLASSIFSPECCD = 'M' AND ROWNO <= #{mCnt}) OR (CLASSIFSPECCD = 'L' AND ROWNO <= #{lCnt})) GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopDasStnSetAssignRsltSku - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > DAS 작업 계획 설정 > 작업계획 결과 조회(SKU 집중화) 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , (SUM(CASE CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'L' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || '/' || SUM(CASE CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || '/' || SUM(CASE CLASSIFSPECCD WHEN 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS DAS_SPEC_CNT , COUNT(OBHDKEY) AS DAS_OB_CNT , #{dasStnUseGrp} AS DAS_STN_USE_GRP , (CASE #{dasSkuChk} WHEN 'Y' THEN '20' ELSE '10' END) AS DAS_SKU_CHK FROM OB_RANK WHERE ((CLASSIFSPECCD = 'S' AND RKNO <= #{sCnt}) OR (CLASSIFSPECCD = 'M' AND RKNO <= #{mCnt}) OR (CLASSIFSPECCD = 'L' AND RKNO <= #{lCnt})) GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopRbAnly - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 로봇 작업 계획 설정 > 출고 분석 현황 조회 */
SELECT BOX.CTKEY , BOX.BOXNM , COALESCE(RB_CNT, 0) + COALESCE(MX_CNT, 0) AS ALL_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RB_CNT, 0) + COALESCE(MX_CNT, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS ALL_CNT_RATIO , COALESCE(RSLT_RB_SKU, 0) + COALESCE(RSLT_MX_SKU, 0) AS ALL_SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RSLT_RB_SKU, 0) + COALESCE(RSLT_MX_SKU, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS ALL_SKU_RATIO , COALESCE(RB_PCS, 0) + COALESCE(MX_PCS, 0) AS ALL_PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RB_PCS, 0) + COALESCE(MX_PCS, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS ALL_PCS_RATIO , COALESCE(RB_CNT, 0) AS RB_CNT , COALESCE(RB_CNT_RATIO, 0) AS RB_CNT_RATIO , COALESCE(RSLT_RB_SKU, 0) AS RB_SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RSLT_RB_SKU, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS RB_SKU_RATIO , COALESCE(RB_PCS, 0) AS RB_PCS , COALESCE(RB_PCS_RATIO, 0) AS RB_PCS_RATIO , COALESCE(MX_CNT, 0) AS MX_CNT , COALESCE(MX_CNT_RATIO, 0) AS MX_CNT_RATIO , COALESCE(RSLT_MX_SKU, 0) AS MX_SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RSLT_MX_SKU, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_SKU_RATIO , COALESCE(MX_PCS, 0) AS MX_PCS , COALESCE(MX_PCS_RATIO, 0) AS MX_PCS_RATIO , COALESCE(MX_RB_CNT, 0) AS MX_RB_CNT , COALESCE(MX_RB_CNT_RATIO, 0) AS MX_RB_CNT_RATIO , COALESCE(RSLT_MX_RB_SKU, 0) AS MX_RB_SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RSLT_MX_RB_SKU, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_RB_SKU_RATIO , COALESCE(MX_RB_PCS, 0) AS MX_RB_PCS , COALESCE(MX_RB_PCS_RATIO, 0) AS MX_RB_PCS_RATIO , COALESCE(MX_FB_CNT, 0) AS MX_FB_CNT , COALESCE(MX_FB_CNT_RATIO, 0) AS MX_FB_CNT_RATIO , COALESCE(RSLT_MX_FB_SKU, 0) AS MX_FB_SKU , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COALESCE(RSLT_MX_FB_SKU, 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_FB_SKU_RATIO , COALESCE(MX_FB_PCS, 0) AS MX_FB_PCS , COALESCE(MX_FB_PCS_RATIO, 0) AS MX_FB_PCS_RATIO , COALESCE(RB_CNT, 0) AS NO_CELL_CNT , 0 AS NO_CELL_SET , COALESCE(MX_CNT, 0) AS FB_CELL_CNT , 0 AS FB_CELL_SET FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY , BOXDIVCD , (CASE BOXDIVCD WHEN '10' THEN BOXNM ELSE '그외' END) BOXNM FROM TWORK_MST_BOX WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND USEYN = 'Y' ) BOX LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , RB_BOXNM , COUNT(RB_OBHDKEY) AS RB_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(RB_OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS RB_CNT_RATIO , SUM(COALESCE(RB_PCS, 0)) AS RB_PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(COALESCE(RB_PCS, 0))) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS RB_PCS_RATIO FROM OB_RB GROUP BY CTKEY , RB_BOXNM ) OBR ON BOX.CTKEY = OBR.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = OBR.RB_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , MX_BOXNM , COUNT(MX_OBHDKEY) AS MX_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(MX_OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_CNT_RATIO , SUM(COALESCE(MX_PCS, 0)) AS MX_PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(COALESCE(MX_PCS, 0))) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_PCS_RATIO FROM OB_MX GROUP BY CTKEY , MX_BOXNM ) OBMX ON BOX.CTKEY = OBMX.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = OBMX.MX_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , MX_BOXNM AS MX_RB_BOXNM , COUNT(MX_RB_OBHDKEY) AS MX_RB_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(MX_RB_OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_RB_CNT_RATIO , SUM(COALESCE(MX_RB_PCS, 0)) AS MX_RB_PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(COALESCE(MX_RB_PCS, 0))) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_RB_PCS_RATIO FROM OB_MX_RB GROUP BY CTKEY , MX_BOXNM ) MXRB ON BOX.CTKEY = MXRB.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = MXRB.MX_RB_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , MX_BOXNM AS MX_FB_BOXNM , COUNT(MX_FB_OBHDKEY) AS MX_FB_CNT , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(COUNT(MX_FB_OBHDKEY)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_FB_CNT_RATIO , SUM(COALESCE(MX_FB_PCS, 0)) AS MX_FB_PCS , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(SUM(COALESCE(MX_FB_PCS, 0))) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS MX_FB_PCS_RATIO FROM OB_MX_FB GROUP BY CTKEY , MX_BOXNM ) MXFB ON BOX.CTKEY = MXFB.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = MXFB.MX_FB_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN RB_SKU R_RB_SKU ON BOX.CTKEY = R_RB_SKU.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = R_RB_SKU.RB_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN MX_SKU R_MX_SKU ON BOX.CTKEY = R_MX_SKU.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = R_MX_SKU.MX_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN MX_RB_SKU R_MX_RB_SKU ON BOX.CTKEY = R_MX_RB_SKU.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = R_MX_RB_SKU.MX_BOXNM LEFT OUTER JOIN MX_FB_SKU R_MX_FB_SKU ON BOX.CTKEY = R_MX_FB_SKU.CTKEY AND BOX.BOXNM = R_MX_FB_SKU.MX_BOXNM ORDER BY BOX.BOXDIVCD , BOX.BOXNM
mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 단포 출고 대상 SQL */ WITH OB_BASE AS ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.CBM , (OH.WEIGHT / 1000) AS WEIGHT , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE , GREATEST(COALESCE(ICUTX.WIDTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.DEPTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.HEIGHT, 0)) AS MAXLEN , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY , OD.OBDTKEY , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = #{wktypecd} AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.OBHDTYPECD IN ('10','20') AND OH.OBHDDAY BETWEEN #{obhddayfr} AND #{obhddayto} ), IC_INFO AS ( SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.OBHDKEY ASC) AS ROWNO FROM ( SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.OBORDKEY , OB.OBHDKEY , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE , INFO.SKU , INFO.PCS , INFO.CBM , INFO.WEIGHT , INFO.MAXLEN , INFO.RBRATIO , INFO.FBPCS FROM OB_BASE OB INNER JOIN ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , COUNT(ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS PCS , SUM(CBM) AS CBM , SUM(WEIGHT) AS WEIGHT , MAX(MAXLEN) AS MAXLEN , SUM(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS FBPCS , ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 0) AS RBRATIO FROM OB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ ) INFO ON OB.CTKEY = INFO.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = INFO.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = INFO.OBHDKEY GROUP BY OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.OBORDKEY , OB.OBHDKEY , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE , INFO.SKU , INFO.PCS , INFO.CBM , INFO.WEIGHT , INFO.MAXLEN , INFO.RBRATIO , INFO.FBPCS ) A WHERE 1=1
)

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSkuSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 단포 출고 대상(SKU 집중화) SQL */ , ITEM_RANK AS ( /* [1단계] 품목코드별 등장 건수 순위 */ SELECT DT.CTKEY , DT.OWKEY , DT.ICKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) AS OBHD_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT DT.OBHDKEY) DESC) AS ITEM_RK FROM IC_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY GROUP BY DT.CTKEY, DT.OWKEY, DT.ICKEY ), HD_MATCH AS ( /* [2단계] 품목 우선순위별로, 그 품목을 포함한 헤더 조합 매핑 */ SELECT HD.CTKEY , HD.OWKEY , HD.OBHDKEY , IR.ICKEY , IR.ITEM_RK FROM IC_INFO HD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT DT ON HD.CTKEY = DT.CTKEY AND HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.OBHDKEY = DT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN ITEM_RANK IR ON DT.CTKEY = IR.CTKEY AND DT.OWKEY = IR.OWKEY AND DT.ICKEY = IR.ICKEY ), OB_RANK AS ( /* [3단계] 품목 우선순위를 기준으로 헤더 순위를 매김 */ SELECT OBINFO.CTKEY , OBINFO.OWKEY , OBINFO.OBORDKEY , OBINFO.OBHDKEY , OBINFO.CBM , OBINFO.WEIGHT , OBINFO.RECOMBOXBARCODE , OBINFO.MAXLEN , OBINFO.SKU , OBINFO.PCS , OB.RK AS RKNO FROM (SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDKEY , MIN(ITEM_RK) AS BEST_ITEM_RK /* 헤더가 가진 품목 중 가장 높은 우선순위 */ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY MIN(ITEM_RK)) AS RK FROM HD_MATCH GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, OBHDKEY) OB INNER JOIN IC_INFO OBINFO ON OB.CTKEY = OBINFO.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OBINFO.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OBINFO.OBHDKEY )
mapper.select:
/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleAnly - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 출고 분석 현황 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS OB_CNT , SUM(SKU) AS SKU , SUM(PCS) AS PCS FROM IC_INFO GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSetAssign - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 주문 배정 현황(오더번호순) 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS OB_CNT , SUM(SKU) AS SKU , SUM(PCS) AS PCS FROM IC_INFO WHERE ROWNO <= #{sObCnt} GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSetAssignSku - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 주문 배정 현황(SKU 집중화) 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS OB_CNT , SUM(SKU) AS SKU , SUM(PCS) AS PCS FROM OB_RANK WHERE RKNO <= #{sObCnt} GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSetAssignRslt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 작업계획 결과 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , #{sObCnt} AS S_OB_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS SIMPLE_OB_CNT , (CASE #{simpleSkuChk} WHEN 'Y' THEN '20' ELSE '10' END) AS SIMPLE_SKU_CHK FROM IC_INFO WHERE ROWNO <= #{sObCnt} GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopSimpleSetAssignRsltSku - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 작업계획 결과 조회(SKU 집중화) 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , #{sObCnt} AS S_OB_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS SIMPLE_OB_CNT , (CASE #{simpleSkuChk} WHEN 'Y' THEN '20' ELSE '10' END) AS SIMPLE_SKU_CHK FROM OB_RANK WHERE RKNO <= #{sObCnt} GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveDlvrySbmRegWblno - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 운송장 접수 대상 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , #{dlvryCorpCd} AS DLVRYCORPCD FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND (COALESCE(OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD, '00') IN ('00','05')) AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '10'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveDlvrySbmReceipt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 택배 접수 대상 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , #{dlvryCorpCd} AS DLVRYCORPCD FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND (COALESCE(OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD, '00') IN ('10','98','99')) AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '10'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaHdStatus - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 웨이브 처리상태 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN OH.DASCELLBARCODE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DASCELLBARCODE , COALESCE(WH.CLASSIFPLANSNDYN, 'N') AS CLASSIFPLANSNDYN , COALESCE(WH.LOCPLANSNDYN, 'N') AS LOCPLANSNDYN , WH.WKTYPECD , WH.WAWKSTATUSCD FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WH.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_DLVRYCORP DLV ON WH.CTKEY = DLV.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = DLV.OWKEY AND WH.DLVRYCORPCD = DLV.DLVRYCORPCD AND DELYN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN CNTRCTSTARTDAY AND CNTRCTCLOSEDAY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('20','25','30','40','50','60') GROUP BY WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , WH.CLASSIFPLANSNDYN , WH.LOCPLANSNDYN , WH.WKTYPECD , WH.WAWKSTATUSCD

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassRsltDw - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - DAS결과 > 스테이션 분배내역 조회 */ WITH WA_BASE AS ( SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , MST.STNNO , STN.STNBARCODE , STN.CLASSIFSPECCD FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN STN ON WH.CTKEY = STN.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = STN.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = STN.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STN MST ON STN.CTKEY = MST.CTKEY AND STN.STNBARCODE = MST.STNBARCODE WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} ), WA_CELL AS ( SELECT WA.CTKEY , WA.OWKEY , WA.WAHDKEY , WA.STNBARCODE , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD , COUNT(DISTINCT CELL.CELLBARCODE) AS AVCELL , SUM(CASE WHEN OBHDKEY IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS CNT FROM WA_BASE WA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_CELL CELL ON WA.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = CELL.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = CELL.WAHDKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = CELL.STNBARCODE
GROUP BY WA.CTKEY , WA.OWKEY , WA.WAHDKEY , WA.STNBARCODE , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD ), WA_PLT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT WA.CTKEY , WA.OWKEY , WA.WAHDKEY , WA.STNBARCODE , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , CST.CELLNO FROM WA_BASE WA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN_LC CELL ON WA.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = CELL.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = CELL.WAHDKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = CELL.STNBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STN MST ON CELL.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND CELL.MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE = MST.STNBARCODE AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '20' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON CELL.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND CELL.MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE = CST.CELLBARCODE ), WA_LIGHT1 AS ( SELECT DISTINCT WA.CTKEY , WA.OWKEY , WA.WAHDKEY , WA.STNBARCODE , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , CST.CELLNO FROM WA_BASE WA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN_LC CELL ON WA.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = CELL.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = CELL.WAHDKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = CELL.STNBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STN MST ON CELL.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND CELL.MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE = MST.STNBARCODE AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' AND MST.CLASSIFTYPECD = '10' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON CELL.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND CELL.MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE = CST.CELLBARCODE ), WA_LIGHT2 AS ( SELECT DISTINCT WA.CTKEY , WA.OWKEY , WA.WAHDKEY , WA.STNBARCODE , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD , MST.STNDIVCD /*설비구분코드 - 10:DAS-소분류, 20:DAS-중분류*/ , MST.CLASSIFDIVCD /*분류구분코드 - 10:경량랙, 20:팔레트랙*/ , MST.CLASSIFTYPECD /*분류유형코드 - 10:중분류 유형1, 20:중분류 유형2*/ , CST.CELLNO FROM WA_BASE WA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_STN_LC CELL ON WA.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = CELL.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = CELL.WAHDKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = CELL.STNBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STN MST ON CELL.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND CELL.MDLCLASSIFSTNBARCODE = MST.STNBARCODE AND MST.STNDIVCD = '20' AND MST.CLASSIFDIVCD = '10' AND MST.CLASSIFTYPECD = '20' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON CELL.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND CELL.MDLCLASSIFCELLBARCODE = CST.CELLBARCODE ) SELECT WA.CTKEY , WA.OWKEY , WA.WAHDKEY , WA.STNNO , WA.STNBARCODE , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD , CELL.AVCELL , CELL.CNT , PLT.CELLNO AS CELLNO_PLT , LIGHT1.CELLNO AS CELLNO_LIGHT1 , LIGHT2.CELLNO AS CELLNO_LIGHT2 FROM WA_BASE WA LEFT OUTER JOIN WA_CELL CELL ON WA.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = CELL.OWKEY AND WA.WAHDKEY = CELL.WAHDKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = CELL.STNBARCODE AND WA.CLASSIFSPECCD = CELL.CLASSIFSPECCD LEFT OUTER JOIN WA_PLT PLT ON WA.CTKEY = PLT.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = PLT.OWKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = PLT.STNBARCODE AND WA.CLASSIFSPECCD = PLT.CLASSIFSPECCD LEFT OUTER JOIN WA_LIGHT1 LIGHT1 ON WA.CTKEY = LIGHT1.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = LIGHT1.OWKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = LIGHT1.STNBARCODE AND WA.CLASSIFSPECCD = LIGHT1.CLASSIFSPECCD LEFT OUTER JOIN WA_LIGHT2 LIGHT2 ON WA.CTKEY = LIGHT2.CTKEY AND WA.OWKEY = LIGHT2.OWKEY AND WA.STNBARCODE = LIGHT2.STNBARCODE AND WA.CLASSIFSPECCD = LIGHT2.CLASSIFSPECCD ORDER BY WA.STNBARCODE ASC , WA.CLASSIFSPECCD ASC

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassRsltDwDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - DAS결과 > 스테이션 상세 출고 내역 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , MST.STNNO , CELL.STNBARCODE , CST.CELLNO , CELL.CELLBARCODE , CELL.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(OD.ALQTY) AS PCS FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DAS_CELL CELL ON WH.CTKEY = CELL.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = CELL.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = CELL.WAHDKEY AND CELL.OBHDKEY IS NOT NULL INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL CST ON CELL.CTKEY = CST.CTKEY AND CELL.STNBARCODE = CST.STNBARCODE AND CELL.CELLBARCODE = CST.CELLBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_STN MST ON CST.CTKEY = MST.CTKEY AND CST.STNBARCODE = MST.STNBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON CELL.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND CELL.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND CELL.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND CELL.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND CELL.STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} GROUP BY WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , MST.STNNO , CELL.STNBARCODE , CST.CELLNO , CELL.CELLBARCODE , CELL.CLASSIFSPECCD , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY ORDER BY CST.CELLNO

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassRsltRw - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 로봇결과 > 로봇 분배내역 조회 */ WITH OB_BASE AS ( SELECT #{ctkey} AS CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , (CASE BOX.BOXDIVCD WHEN '10' THEN BOX.BOXNM ELSE '그외' END) BOXNM , (CASE WHEN OH.ORDSEPTYPECD IN ('30','40') THEN OH.OBHDKEY ELSE NULL END) AS OBHDKEY , (CASE WHEN OH.ORDSEPTYPECD IN ('30','40') THEN OH.ORDSEPTYPECD ELSE NULL END) AS ORDSEPTYPECD , COALESCE(OD.ROBSORTERICYN, 'N') AS ROBSORTERICYN , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX ON OH.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE = BOX.BOXBARCODE WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD = 'RW' ), BASE AS ( SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , WAHDKEY , BOXNM , COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS ALL_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE ORDSEPTYPECD WHEN '30' THEN OBHDKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS RB_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE ORDSEPTYPECD WHEN '40' THEN OBHDKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS MX_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE WHEN ORDSEPTYPECD NOT IN ('30', '40') THEN OBHDKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS EX_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT ICKEY) AS ALL_SKU , COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'Y' THEN ICKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS RB_SKU , COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'N' THEN ICKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS FB_SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS ALL_PCS , SUM(CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'Y' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS RB_PCS , SUM(CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS FB_PCS FROM OB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, WAHDKEY, BOXNM ), FINAL_DATA AS ( -- 1. 박스별 데이터 SELECT OB.CTKEY , OB.OWKEY , OB.WAHDKEY , BOX.BOXNM , COALESCE(OB.ALL_CNT, 0) AS ALL_CNT, COALESCE(OB.RB_CNT, 0) AS RB_CNT, COALESCE(OB.MX_CNT, 0) AS MX_CNT, COALESCE(OB.EX_CNT, 0) AS EX_CNT , COALESCE(OB.ALL_SKU, 0) AS ALL_SKU, COALESCE(OB.RB_SKU, 0) AS RB_SKU, COALESCE(OB.FB_SKU, 0) AS FB_SKU , COALESCE(OB.ALL_PCS, 0) AS ALL_PCS, COALESCE(OB.RB_PCS, 0) AS RB_PCS, COALESCE(OB.FB_PCS, 0) AS FB_PCS , 1 AS SORT_ORDER , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY BOX.BOXNM) AS RNO FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY, (CASE BOXDIVCD WHEN '10' THEN BOXNM ELSE '그외' END) BOXNM FROM TWORK_MST_BOX WHERE CTKEY = '09' AND USEYN = 'Y') BOX LEFT OUTER JOIN BASE OB ON BOX.BOXNM = OB.BOXNM
) SELECT CTKEY, OWKEY, WAHDKEY, BOXNM, ALL_CNT, RB_CNT, MX_CNT, EX_CNT, ALL_SKU, RB_SKU, FB_SKU, ALL_PCS, RB_PCS, FB_PCS , TOT_ALL_CNT, TOT_RB_CNT, TOT_MX_CNT, TOT_ALL_SKU, TOT_RB_SKU, TOT_FB_SKU, TOT_ALL_PCS, TOT_RB_PCS, TOT_FB_PCS , ALL_CNT_RATIO, RB_CNT_RATIO, MX_CNT_RATIO, EX_CNT_RATIO, ALL_SKU_RATIO, RB_SKU_RATIO, FB_SKU_RATIO, ALL_PCS_RATIO, RB_PCS_RATIO, FB_PCS_RATIO FROM FINAL_DATA FI LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT 100 AS ALL_CNT_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_CNT) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(RB_CNT) / SUM(ALL_CNT) * 100 END, 1) AS RB_CNT_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_CNT) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(MX_CNT) / SUM(ALL_CNT) * 100 END, 1) AS MX_CNT_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_CNT) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(EX_CNT) / SUM(ALL_CNT) * 100 END, 1) AS EX_CNT_RATIO , 100 AS ALL_SKU_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_SKU) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(RB_SKU) / SUM(ALL_SKU) * 100 END, 1) AS RB_SKU_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_SKU) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(FB_SKU) / SUM(ALL_SKU) * 100 END, 1) AS FB_SKU_RATIO , 100 AS ALL_PCS_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_PCS) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(RB_PCS) / SUM(ALL_PCS) * 100 END, 1) AS RB_PCS_RATIO , ROUND(CASE SUM(ALL_PCS) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(FB_PCS) / SUM(ALL_PCS) * 100 END, 1) AS FB_PCS_RATIO , 1 AS RNO_RATIO FROM BASE ) RATIO ON FI.RNO = RATIO.RNO_RATIO LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS TOT_ALL_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE ORDSEPTYPECD WHEN '30' THEN OBHDKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS TOT_RB_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT(CASE ORDSEPTYPECD WHEN '40' THEN OBHDKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS TOT_MX_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT ICKEY) AS TOT_ALL_SKU , COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'Y' THEN ICKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS TOT_RB_SKU , COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'N' THEN ICKEY ELSE NULL END)) AS TOT_FB_SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS TOT_ALL_PCS , SUM(CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'Y' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_RB_PCS , SUM(CASE ROBSORTERICYN WHEN 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_FB_PCS , 1 AS TOT_ORDER FROM OB_BASE GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, WAHDKEY ) TOT ON FI.RNO = TOT.TOT_ORDER ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, BOXNM

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassRsltRwDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 로봇결과 > 로봇소터 상세 출고 내역 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , WAHDKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY , BOXNM , ORDSEPTYPECD , COUNT(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN ICKEY END) AS RB_SKU , COUNT(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN ICKEY END) AS FB_SKU , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'Y' THEN EXPCTQTY END), 0) AS RB_PCS , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ROBSORTERICYN = 'N' THEN EXPCTQTY END), 0) AS FB_PCS FROM ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , (CASE BOX.BOXDIVCD WHEN '10' THEN BOX.BOXNM ELSE '그외' END) AS BOXNM , OH.ORDSEPTYPECD , COALESCE(OD.ROBSORTERICYN, 'N') AS ROBSORTERICYN , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX ON OH.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE = BOX.BOXBARCODE WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND OH.WKTYPECD = 'RW' ) BASE WHERE BOXNM = #{boxnm} GROUP BY CTKEY, OWKEY, WAHDKEY, OBORDKEY, OBHDKEY, BOXNM, ORDSEPTYPECD

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectobWaveMgmtWkClassRsltPw - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 분류계획전송 - 덕용결과 > 덕용 출고 내역 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(OD.ALQTY) AS PCS FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.WAHDKEY = OH.WAHDKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} GROUP BY WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T01 - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 - 출고 계획 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , WD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OH.OBHDDAY /*출고예정일자*/ , OH.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , WD.CLASSIFSPECCD /*규격*/ , WD.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*박스*/ , BOX.BOXNM /*박스명*/ , WD.VOL AS CBM /*체적*/ , (WD.WEIGHT / 1000) AS WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WD.TTICCNT AS SKU , WD.TTICQTY AS PCS , COALESCE(WD.DELYN, 'N') AS DELYN /*제외여부*/ , WD.STNBARCODE /*스테이션 바코드*/ , (CASE BOX.BOXDIVCD WHEN '10' THEN BOX.BOXNM ELSE '그외' END) AS ORIBOXNM
GROUP BY WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , WD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OH.OBHDDAY /*출고예정일자*/ , OH.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , WD.CLASSIFSPECCD /*규격*/ , WD.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*박스*/ , BOX.BOXNM /*박스*/ , WD.VOL /*체적*/ , WD.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WD.TTICCNT , WD.TTICQTY , COALESCE(WD.DELYN, 'N') /*제외여부*/ , WD.STNBARCODE /*스테이션 바코드*/ , (CASE BOX.BOXDIVCD WHEN '10' THEN BOX.BOXNM ELSE '그외' END) ORDER BY WD.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T02 - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 상세 - 출고 계획 상세 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , OD.OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태*/ , OD.INITQTY /*초기수량*/ , OD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , OD.ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , OD.PKQTY /*피킹수량*/ , OD.CLASSIFSQTY /*분류실적수량*/ , OD.CNFRMQTY /*확정수량*/

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T03 - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 상품별 상세 - 상품별 상세 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , SUM(OD.EXPCTQTY) AS EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , SUM(OD.ALQTY) AS ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , SUM(OD.PKQTY) AS PKQTY /*피킹수량*/ , SUM(OD.CLASSIFSQTY) AS CLASSIFSQTY /*분류실적수량*/ , SUM(OD.PAKQTY) AS PAKQTY /*포장완료수량*/ , SUM(OD.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY /*확정수량*/
GROUP BY WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtPopInfo_T04 - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 택배접수 상세 - 택배접수 상세 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , WA.WAHDNM /*출고웨이브*/ , OH.OBHDDAY /*출고예정일시*/ , OH.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , OH.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OH.ORDNM, #{encKey}) AS ORDNM /*배송정보*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OH.RCPPRSNNM, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNNM /*수령인명*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OH.RCPPRSNTELNO, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNTELNO /*전화번호*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OH.RCPPRSNADDR1, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNADDR1 /*주소1*/ , OH.DLVYMSG /* 배송메세지 */ , OH.DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사코드*/ , DLV.DLVRYCORPNM /*택배사*/ , OH.WBLNO /*운송장번호*/ , OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD /*택배진행상태*/ , HJSBM.CBMURKEY /*접수자*/ , HJSBM.CBMDATE /*접수일시*/ , HJSBM.ERRMSG /*오류메세지*/ , TRIM(OH.RCPPRSNADDR1) || ' ' || TRIM(OH.RCPPRSNADDR2) AS ADDRESS /*주소_prWblAPI송신용데이터*/ , OH.RCPPRSNZIPCD /*수령인우편번호_prWblAPI송신용데이터*/
GROUP BY WA.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WA.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WA.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , WA.WAHDNM /*출고웨이브*/ , OH.OBHDDAY /*출고예정일시*/ , OH.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , OH.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , OH.ORDNM /*배송정보*/ , OH.RCPPRSNNM /*수령인명*/ , OH.RCPPRSNTELNO /*전화번호*/ , OH.RCPPRSNADDR1 /*주소1*/ , OH.DLVYMSG /*배송메세지*/ , OH.DLVRYCORPCD /*택배사코드*/ , DLV.DLVRYCORPNM /*택배사*/ , OH.WBLNO /*운송장번호*/ , OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD /*택배진행상태*/ , HJSBM.CBMURKEY /*접수자*/ , HJSBM.CBMDATE /*접수일시*/ , HJSBM.ERRMSG /*오류메세지*/ , TRIM(OH.RCPPRSNADDR1) , TRIM(OH.RCPPRSNADDR2) /*주소_prWblAPI송신용데이터*/ , OH.RCPPRSNZIPCD /*수령인우편번호_prWblAPI송신용데이터*/

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmtManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectwaveMgmtPopInfo_T01_Add_WaAddAlObDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 웨이브 정보 상세 > 출고 계획 > 추가 - 웨이브에 추가할 대상 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY , OD.EXPCTQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.OBHDTYPECD IN ('10','20') AND OH.WKTYPECD = #{wktypecd}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectWaveMgmtDeleteOb - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 삭제 - OMS 송신용 데이터 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD = '30' AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '10'

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaDelStatusMap - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 삭제 - 삭제 가능 웨이브 인지 확인 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY , COUNT(WD.OBHDKEY) OB_CNT , SUM(CASE WD.DELYN WHEN 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DEL_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('05','10','11','15','20','25','30') OR DELYN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WA_S_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('40','50') AND DELYN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WA_F_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('00','01','05','10','97','98','99') OR DELYN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OB_S_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBSTATUSCD IN ('20','25','30','40','45','50','60') AND DELYN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OB_F_CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} GROUP BY WH.CTKEY , WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopTotPkMappingSch - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업지시 > 통합피킹 최적매칭 조회 > 결과 조회 - 작업 조회(DAS, 로봇) */ SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , WH.WAWKSTATUSCD /*웨이브 작업상태*/ , WH.WKTYPECD /*웨이브 작업유형*/ , WH.WAHDDAY /*웨이브작업일자*/ , WH.WARND /*웨이브회차*/ , WH.WAHDNM /*웨이브명*/ , COUNT(DISTINCT OD.ICKEY) AS SKU /*SKU*/ , SUM(OD.EXPCTQTY) AS PCS /*PCS*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON WD.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD = #{wktypecd} AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD = '30' GROUP BY WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , WH.WAWKSTATUSCD /*웨이브 작업상태*/ , WH.WKTYPECD /*웨이브 작업유형*/ , WH.WAHDDAY /*웨이브작업일자*/ , WH.WARND /*웨이브회차*/ , WH.WAHDNM /*웨이브명*/

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopTotPkMappingRslt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 작업지시 > 통합피킹 최적매칭 조회 > 결과 조회 - 통합피킹 최적매칭 결과 조회 */ WITH BASE_DT AS ( SELECT WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , WH.WAHDNM /*웨이브명*/ , WH.WKTYPECD /*웨이브 작업유형*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , SUM(OD.EXPCTQTY) AS EXPCTQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE WH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND WH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND WH.WKTYPECD IN ('DW', 'RW') AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD = '30' GROUP BY WH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , WH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , WH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브공통코드*/ , WH.WAHDNM /*웨이브명*/ , WH.WKTYPECD /*웨이브 작업유형*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ ORDER BY WH.WAHDKEY ), DW_RW_PAIRS AS ( SELECT DK.WAHDKEY AS DW_WAHDKEY, RK.WAHDKEY AS RW_WAHDKEY FROM (SELECT DISTINCT WAHDKEY FROM BASE_DT WHERE WKTYPECD = 'DW') DK CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT WAHDKEY FROM BASE_DT WHERE WKTYPECD = 'RW') RK ), COMBINED_ICKEYS AS ( SELECT DRP.DW_WAHDKEY , DRP.RW_WAHDKEY , DW.CTKEY , DW.OWKEY , DW.WAHDKEY AS SRC_WAHDKEY , DW.WAHDNM AS DW_WAHDNM , '' AS RW_WAHDNM , DW.ICKEY , DW.EXPCTQTY FROM DW_RW_PAIRS DRP JOIN BASE_DT DW ON DRP.DW_WAHDKEY = DW.WAHDKEY AND WKTYPECD = 'DW' UNION ALL SELECT DRP.DW_WAHDKEY , DRP.RW_WAHDKEY , RW.CTKEY , RW.OWKEY , RW.WAHDKEY AS SRC_WAHDKEY , '' AS DW_WAHDNM , RW.WAHDNM AS RW_WAHDNM , RW.ICKEY , RW.EXPCTQTY FROM DW_RW_PAIRS DRP JOIN BASE_DT RW ON DRP.RW_WAHDKEY = RW.WAHDKEY AND WKTYPECD = 'RW' ), FINAL_AGG AS ( SELECT MAX(CTKEY) AS CTKEY , MAX(OWKEY) AS OWKEY , DW_WAHDKEY , RW_WAHDKEY , MAX(DW_WAHDNM) AS DAS , MAX(RW_WAHDNM) AS RB , COUNT(DISTINCT ICKEY) AS SKU , SUM(EXPCTQTY) AS PCS FROM COMBINED_ICKEYS GROUP BY DW_WAHDKEY, RW_WAHDKEY ) SELECT 0 AS CHK , CTKEY , OWKEY , DW_WAHDKEY , RW_WAHDKEY , DAS , RB , SKU , PCS FROM FINAL_AGG ORDER BY SKU , PCS

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateAlDtList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 생성한 릴리즈 상세건 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY , CASE WHEN #{wktypecd} = 'PW' THEN 'fixloc' WHEN #{wktypecd} = 'UW' THEN 'fixloc' ELSE NULL END AS ALTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateDasObAss - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 주문 배정 주문건 조회(대,중,소) */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY , CLASSIFSPECCD , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM AS VOL , WEIGHT , SKU AS TTICCNT , PCS AS TTICQTY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY , #{stnbarcode} AS DASSTNBARCODE FROM OB_INFO WHERE CLASSIFSPECCD = #{spec}

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateDasObList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 웨이브관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 생성된 릴리즈 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON OH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = WD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND WD.DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY OH.CLASSIFSPECCD DESC , WD.TTICQTY DESC

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateRbObAss - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 로봇 작업 계획 설정 > 출고 분석 현황 조회(로봇합포) */
SELECT RB.CTKEY , RB.OWKEY , RB.RB_OBORDKEY AS OBORDKEY , RB.RB_OBHDKEY AS OBHDKEY , RB.CLASSIFSPECCD , RB.RECOMBOXBARCODE , RB.CBM AS VOL , RB.WEIGHT , RB.SKU AS TTICCNT , RB.RB_PCS AS TTICQTY , NULL AS WAHDKEY FROM OB_RB RB UNION ALL SELECT MX.CTKEY , MX.OWKEY , MX.MX_OBORDKEY AS OBORDKEY , MX.MX_OBHDKEY AS OBHDKEY , MX.CLASSIFSPECCD , MX.RECOMBOXBARCODE , MX.CBM AS VOL , MX.WEIGHT , MX.SKU AS TTICCNT , MX.MX_PCS AS TTICQTY , NULL AS WAHDKEY FROM OB_MX MX

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateSimpleSkuObAss - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 단포 주문 배정 주문건 조회(SKU 집중화) 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM AS VOL , WEIGHT , SKU AS TTICCNT , PCS AS TTICQTY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY FROM OB_RANK

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateSimpleObAss - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 단포 작업 계획 설정 > 단포 주문 배정 주문건 조회 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY , RECOMBOXBARCODE , CBM AS VOL , WEIGHT , SKU AS TTICCNT , PCS AS TTICQTY , #{wahdkey} AS WAHDKEY FROM IC_INFO

/* wms-outbound-obWaveMgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectObWaveMgmtPopCreateAlDtList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 생성 > 저장 > 웨이브 생성한 릴리즈 상세건 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY , OD.ICKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY = #{wahdkey} AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD = '00'
